content.verdict: qualia is the most polished adults-only resort in Australia — 60 freestanding pavilions on the northern tip of Hamilton Island, with twin infinity pools, the Pebble Beach Club for couples-only beach service, and the Long Pavilion restaurant overlooking the Whitsunday Passage. The architectural language (Chris Beckingham's award-winning timber pavilions) and the absolute commitment to no children under 16 make this the cleanest adults-only luxury option in the southern hemisphere.
content.best_room: The Beach House (1 unit, $7,000+/night) is the bucket-list honeymoon villa — three bedrooms, private pool, beach access. For two, the Windward Pavilion (private plunge pool, ocean view) is the perfect upgrade from the entry-level Leeward Pavilion (still 80 m², private deck, no pool but lush foliage).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival from Hamilton Island airport
itinerary_7_nights.description: Direct flights from Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, or Cairns to Hamilton Island (HTI). qualia buggy collects you. Welcome with cold towels and Whitsundays mango juice. Settle into your pavilion. Dinner at Long Pavilion — coral trout sashimi, Wagyu carpaccio, Margaret River Chardonnay.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Whitehaven Beach by helicopter
itinerary_7_nights.description: Scenic helicopter to Whitehaven Beach (the most photographed beach in Australia). Champagne picnic on the silica sand. Snorkel at Hill Inlet. Return mid-afternoon. Spa cabana massage. Sunset cocktails at Pebble Beach with the resort's signature canapés.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Outer Great Barrier Reef trip
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full-day catamaran to the outer Great Barrier Reef. Two snorkel/dive sites at Bait Reef. Hot lunch on board. Visibility 25m+ on calm days. Return at 5pm. Quiet evening with in-villa dining — coral trout grilled with native pepperleaf butter.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa day + Pebble Beach
itinerary_7_nights.description: Couples' 90-min Spa qualia ritual using Sodashi Australian botanicals. Lunch at the Pebble Beach Club — couples-only, served on cushioned daybeds at the water's edge. Late afternoon laps in the Pool House infinity pool. Dinner under the stars at Long Pavilion.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Bareboat sailing + private island swim
itinerary_7_nights.description: Half-day skippered yacht charter through the Molle Islands. Anchor at a deserted bay for a swim and lunch on board. Return mid-afternoon. Spa hot-stone massage. Sundowner at Pebble Beach with cellar-door Pinot Noir.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Helicopter to Heart Reef + Hill Inlet
itinerary_7_nights.description: Bucket-list scenic flight: Heart Reef (the famous heart-shaped coral formation, only viewable from air), Hill Inlet sand swirls, Whitsunday Passage drops. Champagne breakfast included. Afternoon at the Beach Club. Final dinner at Long Pavilion.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell breakfast & departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Slow breakfast on your private deck — banana bread, smoked Tasmanian salmon, espresso. Final swim. qualia buggy to Hamilton Island airport (5 min). Direct flight back to mainland.

caveats: Hamilton Island is a managed resort island — quiet outside peak summer, but not 'wilderness'.
Rainy/cyclone season Dec–March — book May–Nov for guaranteed weather.
Wi-Fi reliable; phone signal good island-wide.
Pavilion designs use significant timber — request a north-facing pavilion for the most consistent breeze.

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: The honeymoon resort par excellence in Australia — adults-only, 60 freestanding pavilions, twin infinity pools, Pebble Beach club, Long Pavilion fine-dining. Couples make 90% of guests.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: May–November dry season is peak (calm seas, low humidity, perfect snorkel weather). Avoid Dec–March cyclone risk.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 6–9 months for honeymoon dates. The Beach House and Windward Pavilions go first.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: Yes — strictly 16+. No children, no exceptions.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Windward Pavilion for the private plunge pool. Beach House for celebrating something significant. Leeward Pavilion is the value entry but loses the ocean view.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: Fly directly to Hamilton Island (HTI) from Sydney (2.5h), Melbourne (3h), Brisbane (1.5h), Cairns (1.5h). qualia buggy collects you (5 min).
